programs.title: Who Killed Our Father?
programs.desc: After the death of her foster sister, Leila takes a DNA test and discovers the identity of her biological father and sister. However, when her father is tragically murdered, she soon finds herself in more danger than she ever could have imagined.

programs.title: Staged Killer
programs.desc: A popular TV morning show host's life begins to fall apart when a former co-anchor returns.

programs.title: Levels
programs.desc: In the future, a man watches in horror as his girlfriend gets murdered, and the killer seemingly disappears into midair. He soon embarks on a voyage of discovery that leads to shocking revelations that his reality is not what it appears to be.

programs.title: Heartland Homicide
programs.desc: A young police officer discovers the dark secret hidden in a neighborhood restaurant.

programs.title: Heartland Homicide
programs.desc: When Erin Chorney disappears, suspicion falls on her ex-boyfriend Michael Bridges, the last person to have seen her; after investigators' searches come up empty-handed, they orchestrate an operation to woo Bridges into confessing her whereabouts.

programs.title: One Way Mirror
programs.desc: After police discovers Melinda Pleskovic dead in her home just days before her daughter's wedding, police turn to her future son-in-law when his story doesn't seem to add up; he has news of his own, break-ins at the Pleskovic home reveal the culprit.
